name: wrg-crm-openclaw
description: WRG CRM Assistant — WhatsApp hashtag handlers on OpenClaw Gateway

scripts.db:migrate: psql -U wrg_admin -h localhost -d wrg_crm -f db/003_processed_message.sql && psql -U wrg_admin -h localhost -d wrg_crm -f db/004_delivery_log.sql && psql -U wrg_admin -h localhost -d wrg_crm -f db/005_delivery_resend.sql && psql -U wrg_admin -h localhost -d wrg_crm -f db/006_alert_log.sql && psql -U wrg_admin -h localhost -d wrg_crm -f db/007_email_log.sql && psql -U wrg_admin -h localhost -d wrg_crm -f db/008_alert_escalation.sql && psql -U wrg_admin -h localhost -d wrg_crm -f db/009_user_session.sql
scripts.db:reset: psql -d postgres -c 'DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS wrg_crm' && psql -d postgres -c 'CREATE DATABASE wrg_crm OWNER wrg_admin' && npm run db:init && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
